Trump says staying 'for now' but reverses NATO Hormuz push. War Day 18, no ceasefire signals.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Iran Navy chief vows 'deadly retaliation' for US sub sinking IRIS Dena — 87 sailors killed off Sri Lanka
latest_news.source: Times of India / ANI / Economic Times
latest_news.text: Iran Navy chief warns 'deadly retaliation' after US submarine torpedoed frigate IRIS Dena off Galle, Sri Lanka on March 4. 87 crew killed. Iran president calls it 'inhumane crime'. Multiple Indian sources now confirming details.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms Larijani + Basij commander killed — leadership decapitation accelerates
latest_news.text: Iran state media confirms Ali Larijani (SNSC head, de facto security chief) and Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani killed in Israeli strikes. Most senior figures targeted since Day 1.

latest_news.headline: US Embassy Baghdad drone attack + worldwide embassy security review ordered
latest_news.text: Drone hits US Embassy Baghdad. State Dept orders ALL US embassies worldwide to conduct immediate security reviews — first global spillover alert of the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US 'not ready to leave' but will leave 'near future' — reverses NATO Hormuz push
latest_news.text: Trump tells Sky News US 'not afraid of anything', staying 'for now'. But says US 'never did' need NATO help for Hormuz — complete reversal of coalition push from 48h ago.

latest_news.headline: Israel ground operations expanding in Lebanon — 1M+ displaced, UK 'gravely concerned'
latest_news.source: Sky News / Al Jazeera / UK Gov
latest_news.text: Israel announces limited ground ops in southern Lebanon. UK and allies 'gravely concerned'. Hezbollah attacks Israeli troops in 3 border towns. 1M+ Lebanese displaced.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 03:00 UTC) — War Day 18 continues across 5 active theaters. Iran Navy chief vows 'deadly retaliation' for IRIS Dena sinking (87 killed, March 4). Larijani + Basij commander confirmed killed — leadership decapitation accelerating. US Embassy Baghdad drone-struck; worldwide embassy security review (first global spillover alert). Israel ground ops expanding in Lebanon. Iran missiles at Israeli forces near Lebanon border — dual-front engagement. Trump says staying 'for now' but reverses NATO Hormuz push. Oil >$100. No ceasefire signals in any theater.
